title: Reset User Password in IDC/ARX
pre_checks: verify user access form is approved
check if account is locked or password expired
procedure: login to ARX with inputter profile
search for user account (Filter > User ID > Contains)
right-click user ID and select "Reset Password"
highlight password reset request and approve
default password format assigned: - first 4 chars of username + DOB (DDMMYYYY) - example: NC040885 with DOB 08/11/1997 = NC0408111997 - if fails, try MMDDYYYY: NC0411081997
post_verification: user can login with default password
user prompted to set new password
rollback: if reset fails, verify user details
notes: default password sometimes fails with DDMMYYYY format
try MMDDYYYY if first attempt fails
user must comply with password policy on first login
always request up-to-date password reset form
reset form expires in 48 to 72 hours
coordinate with HR for user identity confirmation
